form.formComment: Well supported here last start but failed to deliver, finishing finished 5th over 457m at Temora beaten 8 lengths (26.19) behind Master Mcgraw in a Grade 5 on March 18. Placed two back at this track. Fought on last time. Has the ability and right in the mix.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (24.99) when second at Goulburn in a Grade 4/5. Has two minors from three starts from box 2. Looks a key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when second (35.71) over 622m at Richmond. Although beaten last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with him.

form.formComment: Continued winning form with another impressive display to make it two in a row at Temora over 457m (25.43). In sparkling form and looks a leading chance again.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by a nose at Maitland over 450m (24.97) beating President Rolex in Grade 4/5 on March 30. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.
